hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '(winn_lexer|winn_parser|winn_transform|winn_codegen)' && cd /home/gregwinn/Projects/Personal/winn-lang && rebar3 compile; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.erl$' && cd /home/gregwinn/Projects/Personal/winn-lang && rebar3 eunit; } 2>/dev/null || true
